hero.name: Germán Sandoval
hero.title: Full-Stack Software Engineer
hero.tagline: I build scalable web applications with clean code and thoughtful UX.

about.heading: About Me
about.bio: I'm a passionate software engineer with experience building modern web applications. I love clean architecture, great developer experience, and shipping products people enjoy.
about.bio2: When I'm not coding, you'll find me exploring learning languages with Duolingo, watching series, reading books, taking photos or experimenting with side projects.
about.status: Open to new opportunities and relocation

bullets: Supported projects like ARC XP, Condé Nast and Leviti, delivering engineering solutions that sped up feature rollout by 25% and reduced bugs by 30%, enhancing product quality and delivery.
Provided support for Oracle by fixing bugs and maintaining PL/SQL queries.

brightwell.name: Brightwell
brightwell.description: Built an SDK for Brightwell from scratch, delivering ahead of tight deadlines and leading technology selection to align with project requirements.

tono.name: TonoHealth
tono.description: Built a comprehensive dermatology application for TonoHealth with live chat, video consultations, and integrated e-commerce features.

bullets: Crafted new visual experiences for AtlasSP customers, increasing engagement, and architected server-side logic that reduced API latency and errors, enabling seamless functionality

boattrader.name: BoatTrader
boattrader.description: Spearheaded new functionalities and SEO optimizations for BoatTrader, raising Lighthouse score from 60 to 90 points and increasing site visibility, resulting in a 15% increase in organic traffic.

synchrony.name: Synchrony
synchrony.description: Achieved a remarkable SEO boost at Synchrony, elevating Lighthouse's score from 60 to 90.

cerby.name: Cerby
cerby.description: Earned top performer recognition at Cerby and developed refined scraping techniques for optimal efficiency across multiple platforms.

wizelineos.name: WizelineOS
wizelineos.description: Improved WizelineOS internal tool by leading a UI/UX overhaul, optimizing GraphQL queries, and refining code to enhance functionality and user experience.

bullets: Integrated Backstage for Expedia, adapting it to company requirements and enhancing operational efficiency.

Collaborated in developing microservices on AWS and RabbitMQ. Proactively addressed potential bottlenecks, ensuring seamless communication and scalability for smooth operations in web and mobile applications.
Developed and enhanced a shared React component library for Expedia, fostering uniformity and improving UI cohesiveness across applications, featuring over 50+ reusable components.
Reduced response times from 3 minutes to 30 seconds (~83%) by implementing efficient indexing strategies in the database and optimizing code.

projects.heading: Projects
projects.me_description: My personal portfolio and blog. Built with Next.js App Router, next-intl for multilingual support (EN/ES), Tailwind CSS v4, and framer-motion animations. Features dark mode, MDX blog, dynamic OG images, and RSS feed.
